caption:
There is something about a print that moves like water — earthy, fluid, alive — that makes the world slow down just enough to notice. This Rabens Saloner maxi dress carries the warmth of the island in its every stripe, whether you're facing the light or stepping toward it. Swipe to see how it holds its own from every angle.

Dress: @rabenssaloner
